hausa.reflected_over_x_axis: An nuna shi a kan axis na x
hausa.function_grapher_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Mai zana grafin function. Gajerun hanyoyin keyboard: 1 zuwa 6 na zaɓar nau'in function, D derivative, A yanki, T tebur, L koya.
hausa.where_the_function_crosses_the_x_axis_: Inda function ke tsallake axis na x. A waɗannan wuraren, f(x) = 0. Nemo tushe yana da muhimmanci a algebra da calculus.
hausa.where_the_function_crosses_the_y_axis_: Inda function ke tsallake axis na y. Wannan shine ƙimar f(0) — kawai sa x = 0.
hausa.the_slope_tells_you_how_steep_the_func: Gangara na gaya maka yadda function ke da tsauri a kowane wuri. Layin tangent yana taɓa curve a wuri ɗaya kawai. Yi amfani da trace slider don bincike!
hausa.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Derivative na auna adadin canji. Kunna shi don ganin yadda gangara ke canzawa a duk function. Inda f′(x) = 0, function na da mafi girma ko mafi ƙanƙanta na gida.
hausa.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Yankin da aka yi masa inuwa yana wakiltar integral — jimlar «tarawa» na f(x). A rayuwa ta gaske, wannan na iya nufin nisan da aka yi, makamashin da aka yi amfani, ko yiwuwa.
hausa.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: Idan a > 0, parabola na buɗewa sama (⏣). Idan a < 0, na buɗewa ƙasa (⏢). Vertex shine wurin juyawa. Gwada canza 'a' don gani!
hausa.amplitude_a_controls_the_height_freque: Amplitude (a) na sarrafa tsawo, frequency (b) na sarrafa yawan cycles, kuma phase shift (c) na zaɓar wave hagu/dama. Period = 2π/b.
hausa.standard_sine_wave: Sine wave na yau da kullum
hausa.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: ta amfani da kalmomin yau da kullum masu sauƙi da gajerun jimloli, ba tare da kalmomin fasaha ba
hausa.for_a_high_school_algebra_or_pre_calc_: ga ɗalibin sakandare na algebra ko pre-calc, tare da kalmomi kamar gangara, tsallake, vertex, period, da amplitude
hausa.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Danna «Yi bayani» don malamin AI ya bayyana wannan function a matakin karatu da ka zaɓa.
hausa.function_zoo_six_common_function_shape: Gidan namun function — siffofi shida na yau da kullum na function
hausa.sliders_for_amplitude_frequency_phase_: Sliders na amplitude, frequency, phase. Rarraba discrete na jihohi 5. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.hypothesis_how_does_phase_shift_affect: Hasashe: Ta yaya phase shift ke shafar wave da ake gani?
hausa.find_two_settings_that_produce_visuall: Nemo saitunan biyu da ke samar da waves iri ɗaya a gani.
hausa.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Na fahimta — yi bayani da kalmominka
hausa.explain_how_each_parameter_shapes_a_si: Yi bayanin yadda kowane parameter ke siffanta sine wave.
hausa.design_note_discrete_5_state_marker_no: Bayanin ƙira: alamar discrete na jihohi 5; babu makin wave; babu bayyanawa — bisa ƙira.
